rows.missReason: EMA stack not bullish (9 < 21 or below 50) — moved despite weak trend structure
rows.recommendation: Add news/insider scanner OR loosen EMA stack requirement for small caps

rows.missReason: Too wide a range (BB-w 18.97%) — not a coil setup. Pattern was momentum-driven, not pre-breakout.
rows.recommendation: Add momentum-style scanner: ret5d > 10% + vol > 2× + RSI > 60 firing
